scripts.build: npm install --prefix Services/Auth-service && npm run prisma:generate --prefix Services/Auth-service && npm run build --prefix Services/Auth-service && npm install --prefix Services/Animal-service && npm run prisma:generate --prefix Services/Animal-service && npm run build --prefix Services/Animal-service && npm install --prefix Services/Breeding-service && npm run prisma:generate --prefix Services/Breeding-service && npm run build --prefix Services/Breeding-service && npm install --prefix Services/Health-service && npm run prisma:generate --prefix Services/Health-service && npm run build --prefix Services/Health-service && npm install --prefix Services/Production-service && npm run prisma:generate --prefix Services/Production-service && npm run build --prefix Services/Production-service && npm install --prefix Services/Media-service && npm run prisma:generate --prefix Services/Media-service && npm run build --prefix Services/Media-service && npm install --prefix Services/Alert-service && npm run prisma:generate --prefix Services/Alert-service && npm run build --prefix Services/Alert-service && npm install --prefix Services/Gateway-service && npm run build --prefix Services/Gateway-service
scripts.start: concurrently -c "blue,green,magenta,cyan,white,yellow,gray,blue" -n "Auth,Animal,Breeding,Health,Production,Media,Alert,Gateway" "npm start --prefix Services/Auth-service" "npm start --prefix Services/Animal-service" "npm start --prefix Services/Breeding-service" "npm start --prefix Services/Health-service" "npm start --prefix Services/Production-service" "npm start --prefix Services/Media-service" "npm start --prefix Services/Alert-service" "npm start --prefix Services/Gateway-service"
